positive: A whimsical celestial map illustration showing constellations as friendly mythical beasts (e.g., a unicorn, a griffin) floating through a nebula. Hand-drawn engraving style, gold leaf accents, deep midnight blues and golds, scientific yet magical, antique map aesthetic.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, modern feel, photorealism, messy, harsh colors
